text: There has been no electricity in our area for the past 3 days. The transformer broke down and nobody has come to fix it.
Power outage since yesterday night. Our entire street has no lights and it is very dangerous at night.
Frequent voltage fluctuations are damaging our household appliances. Please send a technician immediately.
The electric meter in my house has been showing incorrect readings for the past two months. I am being overcharged.
A live electric wire is hanging loose near the playground. Children play there and it is extremely dangerous.
Streetlights on Main Road have not been working for over a week. The area is completely dark at night.
Our neighborhood transformer exploded and there has been no power supply for 48 hours. Please restore electricity urgently.
There is a short circuit in the electrical box on our street. Sparks are visible and it is a fire hazard.
Electricity supply keeps cutting off every few hours. I work from home and this is severely affecting my productivity.
I submitted a request to repair the damaged electric pole two weeks ago but no action has been taken.
The billing error on my electricity account shows double the actual usage. Please investigate and correct my bill.
Overhead power lines are hanging dangerously low over the road. A large truck could easily hit them.
There is no water supply in our colony for the last 4 days. We are struggling to manage daily needs.
A major water pipe has burst on Nehru Street and water is flooding the entire road.
The water coming from our tap is brownish and has a foul smell. It is not fit for drinking.
The borewell in our area has dried up completely. We have no alternative water source.
Water supply timings keep changing without any notice. We never know when the water will come.
There is a leakage in the underground water pipeline near the park. Water is being wasted for weeks.
Our locality gets water supply for only 30 minutes per day which is completely inadequate for our needs.
The sewage drain is overflowing onto the street and mixing with the drinking water supply. Serious health risk.
The water pump in Block C has broken down. Residents of three buildings have no water since two days.
I have been requesting a new water tap connection for 6 months but my application has not been processed.
Drain water is backing up into our houses due to a blocked drainage pipe. The entire area is flooded.
Water pressure is extremely low in our building. Water does not reach floors above the second floor.
Garbage has not been collected from our street for over a week. The smell is unbearable.
There is an illegal garbage dump near the school. Children are getting sick due to the unhygienic conditions.
Public toilets in the market area are in a very dirty condition and have not been cleaned for months.
Waste from the construction site is being dumped on the roadside, creating a health hazard.
Stray animals are tearing garbage bags on the street. There is trash spread everywhere every morning.
The drainage system is clogged with garbage and is causing sewage overflow in the residential area.
Residents have been dumping waste near the park without any penalty. The area has become a large dump yard.
Open defecation is still happening near the river bank. Sanitation facilities need to be built urgently.
Hospital waste is being disposed in the open area near our homes. This is extremely dangerous and unhygienic.
The municipal garbage truck has stopped coming to our ward. Trash is piling up outside every house.
There is a strong and persistent bad smell coming from the drain near our house. Please clean it immediately.
Plastic waste is being burned openly in our locality causing air pollution and health issues for residents.
The road in front of our building has multiple large potholes. Two people have already had accidents.
Streetlights on the highway are not working and accidents are happening frequently after dark.
The footpath has been completely dug up for construction and has not been repaired. Pedestrians are walking on the road.
The traffic signal at the main intersection is broken for the past month. Traffic jams form every morning.
The bridge over the river is showing cracks and seems structurally unsafe. Vehicles should not be allowed.
Road repair work was done poorly and within a week the surface has already cracked and broken again.
Unauthorised encroachments on the main road have reduced the road width to half. Traffic is always jammed.
The highway has been under construction for 2 years. The temporary road is full of dust and potholes.
Speed breakers on the residential road are extremely high and have caused damage to several vehicles.
There are no road markings or signs on the newly built road. Drivers are confused and accidents are occurring.
The divider on the main road has fallen down and is obstructing one lane. It is a serious accident hazard.
Rain has completely washed out the road to our village. We are cut off from the main town.
The government hospital has a severe shortage of doctors. Patients wait for 5-6 hours to get treatment.
My driving license renewal has been pending for 3 months. The transport office is not responding.
The local police station refused to file an FIR for my complaint. They turned me away without any help.
Government school teachers are absent most of the time. Children are not receiving proper education.
The public park in our locality is locked and has not been opened for residents for over a month.
Bus services to our area have been cancelled without any announcement. Commuters are facing huge problems.
The fire station in our area is understaffed. It took 45 minutes for the fire truck to arrive during a fire.
The market area is being taken over by unauthorised vendors. Licensed shop owners are being harassed.
My application for a birth certificate has been pending for 2 months at the municipal office. No response.
The government ambulance service does not pick up calls during nights and weekends. This is unacceptable.
Mid-day meal scheme in the local school is not being implemented properly. Children are going hungry.
The ration shop is not giving proper quantities of food grains to cardholders. They are being cheated.
